title: U.S. Home Safety & Water Quality by ZIP Code
description: Water quality, safety scores, violations, lead/copper levels, radon zones, CCR contaminant data, enforcement actions, CO/gas safety, infrastructure risk, and AQI for all 41,344 U.S. residential ZIP codes. 20+ federal data sources (EPA SDWIS, ECHO, PHMSA, FEMA, Census, USGS, AirNow, CDC). Updated weekly from zipcheckup.com.
